query: SELECT CONCAT('DRIVER|', d.id, '|uid:', d.user_id, '|online:', d.is_online, '|avail:', d.is_available) as info FROM drivers d; SELECT CONCAT('ORDER|', o.id, '|', o.order_number, '|status:', o.status, '|driver:', IFNULL(o.driver_id, 'NULL')) as info FROM orders o WHERE o.status NOT IN ('delivered', 'cancelled') ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT CONCAT('DRIVER|', d.id, '|uid:', d.user_id, '|online:', d.is_online, '|avail:', d.is_available) as info FROM drivers d; SELECT CONCAT('ORDER|', o.id, '|', o.order_number, '|status:', o.status, '|driver:', IFNULL(o.driver_id, 'NULL')) as info FROM orders o WHERE o.status NOT IN ('delivered', 'cancelled') ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT 5;
